F_U, p_U for URLLC · F_E, p_E for eMBB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="400" x="190" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QI2OUE9XUQqV0TVKNVvP-4" edge="1" parent="QI2OUE9XUQqV0TVKNVvP-30" source="QI2OUE9XUQqV0TVKNVvP-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#534AB7;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#534AB7;fontSize=10;" target="QI2OUE9XUQqV0TVKNVvP-3" value="Action: F, p per slice"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QI2OUE9XUQqV0TVKNVvP-5" parent="QI2OUE9XUQqV0TVKNVvP-30" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=#0F6E56;fillColor=none;fontColor=#0F6E56;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;spacingLeft=8;arcSize=10;" value="URLLC SLICE
